description: Budget alert templates for cloud infrastructure cost monitoring

templates.name: Budget Warning - 50%
templates.description: Alerts when project reaches 50% of monthly budget

slack.title: Budget Warning: {{project}}

email.subject: [WARNING] Budget Alert - {{project}} at 50%
email.body:
Hello Team,

This is an automated notification that the budget for project **{{project}}** has reached 50% of the monthly limit.

Current spend: ${{current_spend}}
Budget limit: ${{budget_limit}}

Please review resource usage and ensure spending remains within limits.

Regards,
Axentx Budget Monitor

templates.name: Budget Warning - 75%
templates.description: Alerts when project reaches 75% of monthly budget - action recommended

slack.title: Budget Alert: {{project}}

email.subject: [ACTION REQUIRED] Budget Alert - {{project}} at 75%
email.body:
Hello Team,

This is an automated notification that the budget for project **{{project}}** has reached 75% of the monthly limit.

Current spend: ${{current_spend}}
Budget limit: ${{budget_limit}}

Immediate review of resource usage is recommended.

Regards,
Axentx Budget Monitor

templates.name: Budget Critical - 90%
templates.description: Critical alert when project reaches 90% of monthly budget

slack.title: CRITICAL: Budget Alert - {{project}}

email.subject: [CRITICAL] Budget Alert - {{project}} at 90% - Immediate Action Required
email.body:
Hello Team,

**CRITICAL**: The budget for project **{{project}}** has reached 90% of the monthly limit.

Current spend: ${{current_spend}}
Budget limit: ${{budget_limit}}

IMMEDIATE action is required to prevent budget overrun. Please investigate immediately.

Regards,
Axentx Budget Monitor

templates.name: Budget Exceeded - 100%+
templates.description: Emergency alert when project has exceeded monthly budget

slack.title: 🛑 EMERGENCY: Budget Exceeded - {{project}}

email.subject: [EMERGENCY] Budget Exceeded - {{project}} has overrun!
email.body:
Hello Team,

**EMERGENCY**: The budget for project **{{project}}** has been exceeded.

Current spend: ${{current_spend}}
Budget limit: ${{budget_limit}}
Status: EXCEEDED

Emergency measures may be required. Contact the infrastructure team immediately.

Regards,
Axentx Budget Monitor

templates.name: Daily Spend Spike Alert
templates.description: Alerts when daily spend exceeds 150% of average daily budget

slack.title: Spend Spike Alert: {{project}}

email.subject: [INFO] Unusual spending pattern detected - {{project}}
email.body:
Hello Team,

An unusual spending pattern has been detected for project **{{project}}**.

Today's spend: ${{today_spend}}
Daily average: ${{daily_average}}
Multiplier: {{multiplier}}x

Please verify this is expected usage.

Regards,
Axentx Budget Monitor
